title: Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) 2nd Amendment Rules, 2019
description: Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) 2nd Amendment Rules, 2019
text: [To be published in the Gazette oflndia, Extraordinary, part II, section 3, Sub-section (i)] Government of India MINISTRY OF CORPOMTE AFFAIRS Notification New Delhi, 25tt', April, 2019. c.S.R. ......(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sections 396,39g,399,403 and 404 read with sub-sections (1) and (z) ofsection 469 ofthe companies Ac! 2013 (18 of2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules furt-her to amend the Companres (Registration Offices and Fees) Rules,201.4, namely:- 1.
